scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n SIDECAR,FRONTEND "npm run dev:sidecar" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm run install:frontend && npm run install:sidecar
scripts.setup:venv: cd sidecar && python -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install --upgrade pip --quiet && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt
